description: Storage adapters — in-memory stores, Flysystem run logs, Doctrine event store, hot prompt state, local artifact store.

files.responsibility: In-memory RunStoreInterface — map-based get/compareAndSwap for testing.
Doctrine-backed EventStoreInterface — appends/retrieves RunEvents using Doctrine DBAL/ORM.
Doctrine-backed PromptStateStoreInterface — persists hot prompt state snapshots for fast replay avoidance.
Local filesystem ArtifactStoreInterface — stores artifacts under a base directory using Flysystem.
Writes RunEvents as JSONL lines to Flysystem storage — append-only run log for audit and replay fallback.
Reads JSONL run logs from Flysystem storage — parses lines back into RunEvent objects for replay.
